title: Angaaragan
description: This film is about mysterious events that unfold in a forest resort during a twelve-hour investigation in a non-linear play. The story revolves around a police officer who makes an unexpected visit to the resort. The investigation also opens up multiple hidden secrets of paranormal activities related to a late-Queen who was the first owner of this estate in which the resort is located. The investigation leads to invoking of further issues in the resort and what happens next is how the play is designed in the film
